name: Player Abilities
desc: Player toggles flying state. Only sent for the flying flag change.

fields.name: isFlying
fields.desc: True if the player is currently flying

notes: Player can only fly if server has set the allowFlying flag (in S39PacketPlayerAbilities). The invulnerable and creative flags are not modified by this packet.

implementation.overview: Toggles flying state. Carries isFlying (boolean). Modules: Flight (toggle fly), CreativeFly.
